description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the trenpixster/elixir:latest Docker image and a postgres:latest service. Set variables MIX_ENV=test, POSTGRES_DB=job_board_test, POSTGRES_HOST=postgres, POSTGRES_USER=postgres, and POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres. Define a single job named mix in the test stage that runs the global before_script commands: apt-get update && apt-get -y install postgresql-client, mix local.hex --force, mix deps.get --only test, mix ecto.create, mix ecto.migrate, then executes mix test. No caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
